form.label: SDA Threat & Rapid Threat Containment (RTC)
form.description: Fabric FTDv threat detection (eStreamer, index=network) correlated with Cisco ISE Rapid Threat Containment — ANC quarantine → CoA (index=ise). C6 intrusion drops, C9 malware blocks, security-event blocks, and the automated quarantine timeline. SD-Access ISE Integration lab.

search.query: index=network sourcetype=cisco:sfw:estreamer EventType=FileEvent SHA_Disposition=Malware | stats count

panel.title: Threat detection & automated containment — unified timeline (FTD + ISE)

search.query: (index=network sourcetype=cisco:sfw:estreamer (EventType=IntrusionEvent OR (EventType=FileEvent SHA_Disposition=Malware))) OR (index=ise "CoASourceComponent=ANC") | eval evt=case(EventType=="IntrusionEvent","Intrusion drop (FTD)", EventType=="FileEvent","Malware block (FTD)", match(_raw,"CoASourceComponent=ANC"),"ANC quarantine CoA (ISE)", true(),"other") | timechart span=15m count by evt

index=network sourcetype=cisco:sfw:estreamer (EventType=IntrusionEvent OR (EventType=FileEvent SHA_Disposition=Malware)) | eval kind=if(EventType=="FileEvent","Malware (C9)","Intrusion (C6)") | stats count by kind

index=network sourcetype=cisco:sfw:estreamer EventType=IntrusionEvent | eval flow=InitiatorIP.":".InitiatorPort." → ".ResponderIP.":".ResponderPort | table _time IntrusionRuleMessage Classification flow InlineResult Impact UserName IntrusionPolicy | sort -_time

panel.title: Malware blocks — file policy C9-Malware (C9) · eStreamer

search.query: index=network sourcetype=cisco:sfw:estreamer EventType=FileEvent SHA_Disposition=Malware | eval flow=InitiatorIP." → ".ResponderIP.":".ResponderPort | table _time ThreatName FileName FileType FileAction flow UserName FilePolicy | sort -_time

panel.title: Rapid Threat Containment timeline — ISE ANC quarantine → CoA (index=ise)

search.query: index=ise ("CoASourceComponent=ANC" OR "ANCPolicy=Quarantine" OR "AuthorizationPolicyMatchedRule=ANC_Quarantine") | rex "Calling-Station-ID=(?<mac>[0-9A-Fa-f-]+)" | rex "NetworkDeviceName=(?<nad>[^,]+)" | rex "User-Name=(?<user>[^,]+)" | rex "CoAReason=(?<coareason>[^,]+)" | eval stage=case(match(_raw,"5205 NOTICE"),"1. CoA-Disconnect issued (OK)", match(_raw,"5417 NOTICE"),"2. CoA-Disconnect FAILED", match(_raw,"ANCPolicy=Quarantine"),"3. Quarantine re-auth (SGT 255)", true(),"ANC event") | eval who=coalesce(user,mac) | table _time stage who mac nad coareason | sort -_time
index=network sourcetype=cisco:sfw:estreamer EventType=IntrusionEvent | stats count by IntrusionRuleMessage | sort -count | head 8
index=network sourcetype=cisco:sfw:estreamer (EventType=IntrusionEvent OR (EventType=FileEvent SHA_Disposition=Malware)) | stats count as threats by ResponderIP | sort -threats | head 10
